context: Bitcoin surges past $82,750 amid CLARITY Act momentum and institutional adoption, while Ethereum and XRP follow with strong support flows. Senate delays threaten legislative timeline, but macro tailwinds from Fed policy shift and stablecoin clarity keep risk appetite elevated.

tickers.thesis: BTC breaks structural resistance at $80k on CLARITY Act tailwinds and institutional reallocation from equities. ICT breaker block at $81,200 holds; liquidity void above $84,500 sets asymmetric risk/reward target for swing traders.
levels: ICT breaker block; order flow inflection

setup.entry: $81,500–$82,200 (pullback into support; OTE at breaker block)
setup.invalidation: Close below $79,800; breaks weekly demand structure

insights.title: CLARITY Act Regulatory Catalyst Unlocking XRP Rotation
insights.body: Ripple CEO public lobbying and Senate momentum signal imminent passage of CLARITY Act by mid-May, removing regulatory overhang on XRP. Whale repositioning (13–90M token moves to Coinbase in April–May) and CME OI expansion confirm institutional macro positioning shift to long. XRP's 3.2% dominance offers asymmetric leverage to broader crypto narrative on regulatory clarity.

insights.title: BTC Breaker Block Support Holds Institutional Accumulation Signal
insights.body: ICT breaker block at $81,200 holds as dynamic support, confirming institutional buy-side liquidity and order-flow reversal. Coinbase premium elevated; domestic whale accumulation into resistance zones ($84,500–$85,200) suggests max pain dynamics favoring shorts into breakout. Asymmetric risk/reward thesis: long BTC from breaker block ($81,500 entry) with $80,950 stop (MM-safe) targeting $86,100 (weekly POI extension).

insights.title: ETH Correlation Divergence Signals Selective Value Entry vs. Equities Rotation
insights.body: ETH underperforms BTC (1.88% vs. 2.37%) despite Shanghai staking yield at 3.2% attracting DeFi TVL repositioning. Token unlock schedule (240k ETH weekly) creates supply pressure into quarterly open resistance ($2,560), but institutional ETF approval expected Q2 2026 supports mid-term bullish structure. Selective entry at $2,385 imbalance offers risk/reward edge, but macro rotation to equities warrants position sizing caution.
